3191600.name: Pollution
3191600.description: This game is a pixelated adventure game where players use the ASDW key to move, use the left mouse button to attack, and fly airplanes. Retro graphics evoke the glory days of classic games, while captivating gameplay keeps you alert at all times. In this vast field, valuable rewards are scattered, but so are hostile enemies. Players must fly the plane carefully, pick up coins, and avoid or resist enemy attacks. The roar of the engine and the whistling of bullets create an immersive atmosphere. With each successful evasion and defeat of enemies, the game becomes even more exciting. For those who enjoy the challenge of balancing survival and combat, this game offers a thrilling journey.
